en: scores back today too. Oh yeah? This morning. I just came downstairs and there they were,
just sitting on the table. Boy, was I nervous. Just imagining what I got. But then I realized
that I'd have to open them eventually, and so I did. And was I surprised by what I found.
ko: 그리고 내가 발견한 것에 정말 놀랐어.

en: Could have knocked me over with a feather. Yep, I was just that surprised. So, what did you get?
Well, Rory, since you asked, and by the way, I'm not bragging or anything, but I got a 750 math
ko: 음, 로리, 물어봐 줘서 고마워. 자랑하는 건 아니지만, 수학 750, 언어 730이야.

en: and a 730 verbal. Wow, that is good. Congratulations. Thank you. Those are great scores.
So, did you get your scores back yet? Yep. And? I'm happy. How happy? Pretty happy. Yes, but how do I
know that you're not one of those people who gets pretty happy looking at a sunset? How do I know
